title: The World Remains Lopsided What This Means For Asset Allocation
section_path: The World Remains Lopsided What This Means For Asset Allocation
section_path_text: The World Remains Lopsided What This Means For Asset Allocation
summary:
Main
The world is still lopsided - what this means for asset allocation
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this week:
The world is unbalanced. It will likely remain so for some time
Higher yield is not "free". It reflects rising inflation and geopolitical risks.
